title: anil procera
intro: Anil procera, also known as Anisomeles malabarica, is a flowering plant that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Anil procera include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce fever. Anil procera is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in the form of essential oils and extracts.
